response: Civil Case No. 101 83 – filed on June 3, 1985 by [Bank Name] against the Monetary Board, the Central Bank of the Philippines and [Individual Name 1], [Individual Name 2], [Individual Name 3] and [Individual Name 4], challenging the validity of the resolution dated March 22, 1985 of the Monetary Board of the then Central Bank, which ordered the liquidation of [Bank Name].
